fieldValues.value: **15.** Every `fieldId` referenced by any `View.fieldViews[]` entry in `Package.views[]` must appear in `Package.dependencyRefs` with `definitionType: "field"` or be present in `Package.fields[]`. If `mode === "bundled"`, that `Field` must be present in `fields[]`.

sourceRefs.note: Subsection 08-6 from srs-spec.md - coarse source anchoring during migration
